$(document).on('click', '.crisisWrapper', function() {
		if (isUserSignedIn === true) {

	readCrisisNotificationPopup();
	}
});

function readCrisisNotificationPopup(){
var saveAction = '/c/portal/read_crisispopup_notification';
$.ajax({
 type : 'POST',
 url  : saveAction,
 data : '',
 success : function(data){
		 }
});
}

$(document).ready(function(){
   var showHeadlineChar = 70; 
	 var notificationDetaillChar = 190;
		var ellipsestextFlyout = " ";
	 $('.notificationDetail .trimText').each(function() {
			var contentFlyout = $(this).html();
			if(contentFlyout.length > notificationDetaillChar) {
	 
				var flyoutShorttext = contentFlyout.substr(0, notificationDetaillChar);
				var flyoutShorttextElipse =  flyoutShorttext + '&nbsp;... ';
        $(this).html(flyoutShorttextElipse);
			}
	 
		});
$('.notificationList .flyoutNotification .heading').each(function() {
			var contentFlyout = $(this).html();
			if(contentFlyout.length > showHeadlineChar) {
	 
				var flyoutShorttext = contentFlyout.substr(0, showHeadlineChar);
				var flyoutMoretext = contentFlyout.substr(showHeadlineChar, contentFlyout.length - showHeadlineChar);
	 
				var elipseText = flyoutShorttext + '<span class="moreellipses">' + ellipsestextFlyout+ '&nbsp;...</span><span class="morecontent"><span>' + flyoutMoretext + '</span>';
	 
				$(this).html(elipseText);
			}
	 
		});

});

				var flyoutShorttextElipse =  flyoutShorttext + '&nbsp;... ';
        $(this).html(flyoutShorttextElipse);
			}
	 
		});
$('.notificationList .flyoutNotification .heading').each(function() {
			var contentFlyout = $(this).html();
			if(contentFlyout.length > showHeadlineChar) {
	 
				var flyoutShorttext = contentFlyout.substr(0, showHeadlineChar);
				var flyoutMoretext = contentFlyout.substr(showHeadlineChar, contentFlyout.length - showHeadlineChar);
	 
				var elipseText = flyoutShorttext + '<span class="moreellipses">' + ellipsestextFlyout+ '&nbsp;...</span><span class="morecontent"><span>' + flyoutMoretext + '</span>';

$(document).on('click', '.notification-close-btn, .rNotificationContainer .notificationList .notificationListItem .heading, .bell-icon', function() {
	let bellIconClicked = false;
	if($(this).hasClass('bell-icon')) {
		bellIconClicked = true;
		if($("body").hasClass("old-typo")) {
			$("body").removeClass("old-typo").addClass("old");
		}
	}
	
	if($(window).width() > 1024) {
		openNotificationFlyoutInDesktop();
	} else {
		openNotificationFlyoutInMobile();
	}
	if(Liferay.ThemeDisplay.isSignedIn()){
	var readNotificationURL = '/c/portal/read_notification';
		$.ajax({
			url: readNotificationURL.toString(),
			data: { bellIconClicked: bellIconClicked }, 
			dataType: "html",
			type: "post",
			success: function(data) {
				var notificationCount = data;
					if(notificationCount && notificationCount!='') {
						if(notificationCount>0) {
							let notificationCountSpan = '<span class="lcagBadge pill small bold">'+notificationCount+'</span>';
							$(".bell-icon.rHeaderItem.rBellIconBtn").html(notificationCountSpan);
						} else {
							$(".bell-icon.rHeaderItem.rBellIconBtn .lcagBadge").remove();
						}
					} 
					if(bellIconClicked == false) {
						window.location.href = "/notification-overview";
					}
			
			}
	});
	}else{
		if(bellIconClicked == false) {
			window.location.href = "/notification-overview";
		}
	}
	
});

$(document).ready(function() {
	let notificationCount = '';
	if(notificationCount && notificationCount!='') {
		let notificationCountSpan = '<span class="lcagBadge pill small bold">'+notificationCount+'</span>';
		$(notificationCountSpan).prependTo(".bell-icon.rHeaderItem.rBellIconBtn");
	} 
	let isPopupNotificationExists = '';
	if(isPopupNotificationExists && isPopupNotificationExists=="true") {
		$("#NotificalModal").prependTo("body");
	}

});
$(document).on('click', '.notification-close', function(){
	 if($("body").hasClass("old")) {
			$("body").removeClass("old").addClass("old-typo");
		}
});

AUI().use(
  'liferay-form',
function(A) {
(function() {
var $ = AUI.$;var _ = AUI._;
	Liferay.Form.register(
		{
			id: '_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_loginForm'

			
				, fieldRules: [

					

				]
			

			
				, onSubmit: function(event) {
					event.preventDefault();
				}
			

			, validateOnBlur: false
		}
	);

	var onDestroyPortlet = function(event) {
		if (event.portletId === 'com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet') {
			delete Liferay.Form._INSTANCES['_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_loginForm'];
		}
	};

	Liferay.on('destroyPortlet', onDestroyPortlet);

	
		A.all('#_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_loginForm .input-container').removeAttribute('disabled');
	

	Liferay.fire(
		'_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_formReady',
		{
			formName: '_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_loginForm'
		}
	);
})();
});

var sourceIdMap= {};
$(window).load(function() {
	let consentEnabled = 'true';
	let allowedDomains = 'https://static.lufthansa-cargo.com';
	let listOfAllowedDomains = allowedDomains.split(";");
	let found=true;
	let iframeSourceList = '[]';
	if(consentEnabled=='true') {
		let iframeFound = "false";
		let articleDisplayId = "REGISTRATION_WEB_CONTENT";
		if(iframeFound == "true") {
			if (iframeSourceList.length > 0) {
				found = !(listOfAllowedDomains.some(r=> iframeSourceList.includes(r)));
			}
			
			if(found){
				$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+']').insertAfter($('[data-analytics-asset-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] iframe'));
				$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .btnConsent').each(function(index){
					$(this).attr('data-id', index++);
				});
				$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .btnConsent').click(function(){
					let clickedIndex = $(this).attr('data-id');
					let iframesrcList = sourceIdMap["REGISTRATION_WEB_CONTENT"];
					if(iframesrcList!=undefined && iframesrcList.length>0) {
						$(this).parents('div').prev('iframe').attr('src', iframesrcList.split(", ")[clickedIndex].replace("[","").replace("]",""));
						$(this).parents('.videoOverlayConsent').remove();
					}
				});
				$('[data-analytics-asset-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] iframe').parent('p').addClass("videoOverlayMsg");
				sourceIdMap[articleDisplayId]=iframeSourceList;
				setTimeout(function(){
					let isConsentGiven = false;
					if(typeof utag != "undefined" && typeof utag.data["usercentrics_services_with_consent"] != "undefined" && 
							iframeSourceList!=undefined && iframeSourceList.length>0){
						for(let i=0;i<utag.data["usercentrics_services_with_consent"].length;i++){
							let index = $('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .videoOverlayConsent .btnConsent').attr('data-id');
							if(index < iframeSourceList.length && 
									isConsentPresent(iframeSourceList.split(", ")[index], utag.data["usercentrics_services_with_consent"][i].toLowerCase())){
								$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+']').prev('iframe').attr('src', iframeSourceList.split(", ")[index].replace("[","").replace("]",""));
								$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .videoOverlayConsent').remove();
								isConsentGiven = true;
								 break;
							 }
						 }
					} 
					if(!isConsentGiven){
						$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .videoOverlayConsent').removeClass('hide');
					}
				}, 500);
			}
		}
	}
});
function isConsentPresent(iframeSource, consentValue){
	if(consentValue.trim().includes("youtube") 
			&& iframeSource.toLowerCase().trim().includes("youtube")){
		return true;
	}
	return iframeSource.toLowerCase().trim().includes(consentValue.trim());
}

window.addEventListener('UC_UI_CMP_EVENT', function (e){
	window.addEventListener('ucEvent', function(event){
		if(event.detail && event.detail.event == "consent_status"){
			for (let articleDisplayId in sourceIdMap) {
			    if (sourceIdMap.hasOwnProperty(articleDisplayId)) {
			        let iframeSourceList = sourceIdMap[articleDisplayId];
			        let index = $('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .videoOverlayConsent .btnConsent').attr('data-id');
					if(index < iframeSourceList.length){
				        $('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+']').prev('iframe').attr('src', iframeSourceList.split(", ")[index].replace("[","").replace("]",""));
						$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .videoOverlayConsent').remove();
					}
			    }
			}
		}
	});
});


  
							
							
								   
										
								  
							
						  
						  
						  
					  
					
				  
						
		
		  

		   
AUI().use(
  'liferay-form',
function(A) {
(function() {
var $ = AUI.$;var _ = AUI._;
			var form = document.getElementById('_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_loginForm');
	    	 
			if (form) {
				var password = form.querySelector('#_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_password');
				if (password) {
					if(password == '' || password == 'Password') {
						$('input[name=_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_password]').addClass('login-placeholder');
					} else {
						$('input[name=_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_password]').removeClass('login-placeholder');
					}
					password.addEventListener('keypress', (event) => {
						Liferay.Util.showCapsLock(
							event,
							'_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_passwordCapsLockSpan'
						);
					});
				}
			}
			$("#_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_loginButton").click(function(e) {
				e.preventDefault();
				let $loginButton = $(this);
				$loginButton.prop('disabled', true);
				var formValidator = Liferay.Form.get('_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_loginForm').formValidator;
				formValidator.validate();
				
			if(!formValidator.hasErrors()){
				$("#_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_loginForm").submit();
			}
			else {
				$loginButton.prop('disabled', false);
			}
			});
			$(".loginFirstChild input").keypress(function(event) {
			    if (event.which == 13) {
			    	var formValidator = Liferay.Form.get('_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_loginForm').formValidator;
					formValidator.validate();
			        event.preventDefault();
			        if(!formValidator.hasErrors()){
			       	 $("#_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_loginForm").submit();
			        }
			    }
			});
		
})();
});

  
	

   
AUI().use(
  'liferay-form',
function(A) {
(function() {
var $ = AUI.$;var _ = AUI._;
var userIdErrorMsg = '\u0050\u006c\u0065\u0061\u0073\u0065\u0020\u0065\u006e\u0074\u0065\u0072\u0020\u0061\u0020\u0076\u0061\u006c\u0069\u0064\u0020\u0075\u0073\u0065\u0072\u006e\u0061\u006d\u0065';
var passwordErrorMsg = '\u0050\u006c\u0065\u0061\u0073\u0065\u0020\u0065\u006e\u0074\u0065\u0072\u0020\u0079\u006f\u0075\u0072\u0020\u0070\u0061\u0073\u0073\u0077\u006f\u0072\u0064';
Liferay.Form.register(
      {
          id: '_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_loginForm',
          fieldRules: [
               {
                body: function (val, fieldNode, ruleValue) {
         
                   var result = false;
					if(val.length > 5 && val.length < 41) {
						var regex = /^[0-9a-zA-Z@_\\.\\-]+$/; 
					    if(regex.test(val)) {
					    	result = true;
					    }
					} 
                return result;
                },
               custom: true,
          		errorMessage: userIdErrorMsg,
                fieldName: '_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_login',
               validatorName: 'custom_rule_userid'
               },
               {
                   body: '',
                   custom: false,
                   errorMessage: userIdErrorMsg,
                   fieldName: '_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_login',
                   validatorName: 'required'                    
                },
               {
                body: '',
                custom: false,
                errorMessage: passwordErrorMsg,
                fieldName: '_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_password',
                validatorName: 'required'                    
             }
        	]
   }
);


})();
});

  
   
$(document).ready(function(){
	$("#_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_passwordLabel").html('Password');
    $("#_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_loginLabel").html('Username');
	var showComfortCookieErrorMg = '';
	if(showComfortCookieErrorMg && showComfortCookieErrorMg=="true"){
		disableRememberMeCheckbox();
	}
	$('.loginportlet .lfr-icon-item.taglib-icon,.login-container .lfr-icon-item.taglib-icon').addClass('loginPortletLinks links');
	if($("div").hasClass("login-container") && $("div").hasClass("lcagNotification error")) {
         $(".eportal .header-section .navbar-inner").show();   
	}

	$( ".login-close, .close-btn" ).click(function() {
	  $(".loginsection .dropdown").removeClass("open");
	  $('body').css('overflow-y','auto');
	  $('.login-container .registerLinkContainer').hide();
	  $('.login-container .login-parent').show();
	  //add old-typo class on close of login popup.
	  if($("body").hasClass("old")) {
			$("body").removeClass("old").addClass("old-typo");
		}
	});
	$("#showConstentPopup").click(function(){
		event.preventDefault();
		if(UC_UI) {
			UC_UI.showSecondLayer().then(window.addEventListener("ucEvent", function(e) {
	            location.reload();
	        }));
		}
	});
	/* EPORT-987259 starts */
	$('.registerCompanyLink').attr('href', 'https://www.lufthansa-cargo.com/en/register-company-account?p_p_id=com_lhcargo_eportal_register_company_account&p_p_lifecycle=0&p_p_state=normal');
	$('.registerUserLink').attr('href', 'https://www.lufthansa-cargo.com/?p_p_id=com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet&p_p_lifecycle=0&p_p_state=maximized&p_p_mode=view&_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_mvcRenderCommandName=%2Flogin%2Fcreate_account&saveLastPath=false');
	$('#loginPortletLink').click(function() {
		$('.login-container .login-parent').show();
		$('.login-container .registerLinkContainer').hide();
	});
	$('.registerLinkButton').click(function() {
		$('.login-container .login-parent').hide();
		$('.login-container .registerLinkContainer').show();
	});
	/* EPORT-987259 ends */
})
function disableRememberMeCheckbox(){
	$("#_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_rememberMe").attr("disabled", true);
	$(".preventAction").addClass("disabled");
	$(".comfortCookieErrorMsg").removeClass("hide");
}
function enableRememberMeCheckbox(){
	$("#_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_rememberMe").attr("disabled", false);
	$(".preventAction").removeClass("disabled");
	$(".comfortCookieErrorMsg").addClass("hide");
}
$(window).load(function() {
	if($("div").hasClass("loginRequired") || $("div").hasClass("openLoginSection")) {
		if($(window).width() < 992) {
			$(".rHeaderItem.rBurgerBtn").click();
		}
		$(".loginsection .dropdown").addClass("open"); 
	}
});

    /* When the user clicks on the button, 
    toggle between hiding and showing the dropdown content */
     function changeLanguage(elm) {
			elm.nextElementSibling.classList.toggle("showLanguages");
    }
    
    // Close the dropdown if the user clicks outside of it
    window.onclick = function(event) {
      if (!event.target.matches('.lhcLangBtn')) {
        var dropdowns = document.getElementsByClassName("lhcLangContent");
        var i;
        for (i = 0; i < dropdowns.length; i++) {
          var openDropdown = dropdowns[i];
          if (openDropdown.classList.contains('showLanguages')) {
            openDropdown.classList.remove('showLanguages');
          }
        }
      }
    }

	$(document).ready(function(){
	    $('.rNavigationWrapper ul li:nth-child(3) .openMenuItem').addClass('hide');
		$('.rNavigationWrapper ul li:nth-child(3) .closeMenuItem ').removeClass('hide');
		$(".showMore").click(function () {
			$(this).parent().parent().siblings(".rExtendedNav").slideDown();
			$(this).hide();
			$(this).siblings('.showLess').show();
			setNavItemWidth();
		});
		$(".showLess").click(function () { 
			$(this).parent().parent().siblings(".rExtendedNav").slideUp();
			$(this).hide();
			$(this).siblings('.showMore').show();
		});
        if($(window).width() < 992) {
            $(".hoverableItem").click(function () {
				$(".rMobileOverlay").css('opacity', '0');
				$(".hoveredNav .rMobileHeaderBox").show();
                $(this).siblings('.hoveredNav').show('slide', {direction: 'right'});
            });
            $("#p_p_id_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_").prependTo(".rMobileNavItemBox .loginportlet");
            $(".rWebOverlay .loginportlet #p_p_id_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_").remove();
            $(".fciHeaderWrapper .loginportlet #p_p_id_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_").remove();
        } else {
            $("#p_p_id_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_").prependTo(".rWebOverlay .loginportlet");
            $("#p_p_id_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_").prependTo(".fciHeaderWrapper .loginportlet");
            $(".rMobileNavItemBox .loginportlet #p_p_id_com_liferay_login_web_portlet_LoginPortlet_").remove();
        }
		if($(window).width() > 992) {
			$('.hoveredNav ul li a, .clickableNav a').click(function () {
				if (!$("ul.loginsection").length) {
					setTimeout(function() {
						$('.rHeaderItem.adminBtn').removeClass('blankAdminNav');
					}, 1000);
				}
			});
		}
	});

		$( document ).ready(function() {
		   if($(window).width() > 992) {
				if(!$("ul.loginsection").length) {
					$(".rHeaderItem.adminBtn").removeClass('blankAdminNav');  
				}
				let isexternal = '0';
				if(isexternal != '0') {
					$('.rHeaderComponents .rHeaderItem.adminBtn').addClass('blankAdminNav');
				}
			}
			var shrinkHeaderTop = 50;
			$(window).scroll(function() {
			var scroll = getCurrentScroll();
				if ( scroll >= shrinkHeaderTop ) {
					$(".fciHeaderWrapper").addClass('shrinkHeader');
				}
				else {
					$(".fciHeaderWrapper").removeClass('shrinkHeader');
				}
			});
			function getCurrentScroll() {
				return window.pageYOffset;
			}
		});
	  		   
            
		  

		   
			






























	

		


















	
	
	
		   
			.master-layout-fragment .portlet-header {
				display: none;
			}

$(document).ready(function(){
  if($('.latestCrisisHeadline').length>0 && $('.latestCrisisHeadline').text().trim()!=""){
		var crisis_headline = $('.latestCrisisHeadline').text();
    crisis_headline = crisis_headline.substring(0, 70);
		$(".eportalBreadcrumb .breadcrumb li:last-child").text(crisis_headline);
	}
});

var sourceIdMap= {};
$(window).load(function() {
	let consentEnabled = 'true';
	let allowedDomains = 'https://static.lufthansa-cargo.com';
	let listOfAllowedDomains = allowedDomains.split(";");
	let found=true;
	let iframeSourceList = '[]';
	if(consentEnabled=='true') {
		let iframeFound = "false";
		let articleDisplayId = "SHIPMENT_TRACKING";
		if(iframeFound == "true") {
			if (iframeSourceList.length > 0) {
				found = !(listOfAllowedDomains.some(r=> iframeSourceList.includes(r)));
			}
			
			if(found){
				$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+']').insertAfter($('[data-analytics-asset-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] iframe'));
				$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .btnConsent').each(function(index){
					$(this).attr('data-id', index++);
				});
				$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .btnConsent').click(function(){
					let clickedIndex = $(this).attr('data-id');
					let iframesrcList = sourceIdMap["SHIPMENT_TRACKING"];
					if(iframesrcList!=undefined && iframesrcList.length>0) {
						$(this).parents('div').prev('iframe').attr('src', iframesrcList.split(", ")[clickedIndex].replace("[","").replace("]",""));
						$(this).parents('.videoOverlayConsent').remove();
					}
				});
				$('[data-analytics-asset-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] iframe').parent('p').addClass("videoOverlayMsg");
				sourceIdMap[articleDisplayId]=iframeSourceList;
				setTimeout(function(){
					let isConsentGiven = false;
					if(typeof utag != "undefined" && typeof utag.data["usercentrics_services_with_consent"] != "undefined" && 
							iframeSourceList!=undefined && iframeSourceList.length>0){
						for(let i=0;i<utag.data["usercentrics_services_with_consent"].length;i++){
							let index = $('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .videoOverlayConsent .btnConsent').attr('data-id');
							if(index < iframeSourceList.length && 
									isConsentPresent(iframeSourceList.split(", ")[index], utag.data["usercentrics_services_with_consent"][i].toLowerCase())){
								$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+']').prev('iframe').attr('src', iframeSourceList.split(", ")[index].replace("[","").replace("]",""));
								$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .videoOverlayConsent').remove();
								isConsentGiven = true;
								 break;
							 }
						 }
					} 
					if(!isConsentGiven){
						$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .videoOverlayConsent').removeClass('hide');
					}
				}, 500);
			}
		}
	}
});
function isConsentPresent(iframeSource, consentValue){
	if(consentValue.trim().includes("youtube") 
			&& iframeSource.toLowerCase().trim().includes("youtube")){
		return true;
	}
	return iframeSource.toLowerCase().trim().includes(consentValue.trim());
}

window.addEventListener('UC_UI_CMP_EVENT', function (e){
	window.addEventListener('ucEvent', function(event){
		if(event.detail && event.detail.event == "consent_status"){
			for (let articleDisplayId in sourceIdMap) {
			    if (sourceIdMap.hasOwnProperty(articleDisplayId)) {
			        let iframeSourceList = sourceIdMap[articleDisplayId];
			        let index = $('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .videoOverlayConsent .btnConsent').attr('data-id');
					if(index < iframeSourceList.length){
				        $('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+']').prev('iframe').attr('src', iframeSourceList.split(", ")[index].replace("[","").replace("]",""));
						$('[data-id='+ articleDisplayId+'] .videoOverlayConsent').remove();
					}
			    }
			}
		}
	});
});

// Top scroll button script
$(document).ready(function(){
    $("html").css('scroll-behavior', 'auto');
	var webpage = $("body");
	var webpage_height = webpage.height();
	var trigger_height = webpage_height * 0.60;
	
	$(window).scroll(function(){
		if ($(window).scrollTop() > (webpage_height-trigger_height)) {
			$(".topScroll").css("opacity","1");
		}
		else{
			$(".topScroll").css("opacity","0");
		}

	});

   var toTop = $('.scrollArrowBtn');
   // logic
   toTop.on('click', function() {
     $('html, body').animate({
       scrollTop: $('html, body').offset().top
       }, 1500,
     );
   });
});
  
   
$(document).ready(function() {
    $("#spanishConsent").click(function(){
        setCookie("spanishLangConstent", true, 365);
        $(".spanishPopupContent").addClass('hide');
        $("#spanishLangModal").addClass('hide');
    });
    var spanishConstentCookie = getCookie("spanishLangConstent");
    console.log("spanishConstentCookie: "+spanishConstentCookie);
    if(spanishConstentCookie === null || spanishConstentCookie=="false") {
        $(".spanishPopupContent").removeClass('hide');
        $("#spanishLangModal").removeClass('hide');
    }
});
    function setCookie(name,value,days) {
    var expires = "";
    if (days) {
        var date = new Date();
        date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days*24*60*60*1000));
        expires = "; expires=" + date.toUTCString();
    }
    document.cookie = name + "=" + (value || "")  + expires + "; path=/";
}
function getCookie(name) {
    var nameEQ = name + "=";
    var ca = document.cookie.split(';');
    for(var i=0;i < ca.length;i++) {
        var c = ca[i];
        while (c.charAt(0)==' ') c = c.substring(1,c.length);
        if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) == 0) return c.substring(nameEQ.length,c.length);
    }
    return null;
}
function eraseCookie(name) {   
    document.cookie = name +'=; Path=/; Expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:01 GMT;';
}

	if('false' && ("" === "true")) {
		
		var surveyTitle = "";
		var surveyInternalTimer;
		$(document).ready(function() {
				/* If it is a time based survey */
				if("true" == "") {
					/* check if time survey show time achieved at a interval of 1 minute */
					surveyInternalTimer = setInterval(checkIfSurveyDisplayTimeAchieve, 30000);
				} else {
					openSurveyFirstPopup(surveyTitle);
				}
		});
		function checkIfSurveyDisplayTimeAchieve() {
			
			var userLogInTime = '0';
			var timeAfterDisplay = parseFloat("");
			
			if(userLogInTime >= timeAfterDisplay) {
				openSurveyFirstPopup(surveyTitle);
				clearInterval(surveyInternalTimer);
			}
			
		}
		function addSmallPopupClass() {
			$('#popUpDialog').addClass('alreadyAccepted');
		}
		function hideWidgetMask() {
			$('#popUpDialog').hide();
			$(".yui3-widget-mask").hide();
		}
	}
	
  


		





















































































	









	









   

	
		

			

			
		
	


   

  















	

	

	
		
	


























	


	
		
	



























	
		
	









































	

		
            


   
(function() {var $ = AUI.$;var _ = AUI._;
	var onVote = function (event) {
		if (window.Analytics) {
			let title = event.contentTitle;

			if (!title) {
				const dmNode = document.querySelector(
					'[data-analytics-file-entry-id="' + event.classPK + '"]'
				);

				if (dmNode) {
					title = dmNode.dataset.analyticsFileEntryTitle;
				}
			}

			Analytics.send('VOTE', 'Ratings', {
				className: event.className,
				classPK: event.classPK,
				ratingType: event.ratingType,
				score: event.score,
				title,
			});
		}
	};

	var onDestroyPortlet = function () {
		Liferay.detach('ratings:vote', onVote);
		Liferay.detach('destroyPortlet', onDestroyPortlet);
	};

	Liferay.on('ratings:vote', onVote);
	Liferay.on('destroyPortlet', onDestroyPortlet);
})();

	function getValueByAttribute(node, attr) {
		return (
			node.dataset[attr] ||
			(node.parentElement && node.parentElement.dataset[attr])
		);
	}

	function sendDocumentDownloadedAnalyticsEvent(anchor) {
		var fileEntryId = getValueByAttribute(
			anchor,
			'analyticsFileEntryId'
		);
		var title = getValueByAttribute(
			anchor,
			'analyticsFileEntryTitle'
		);
		var version = getValueByAttribute(
			anchor,
			'analyticsFileEntryVersion'
		);

		if (fileEntryId) {
			Analytics.send('documentDownloaded', 'Document', {
				groupId: themeDisplay.getScopeGroupId(),
				fileEntryId,
				preview:
					!!window._com_liferay_document_library_analytics_isViewFileEntry,
				title,
				version,
			});
		}
	}

	function handleDownloadClick(event) {
		if (window.Analytics) {
			if (event.target.nodeName.toLowerCase() === 'a') {
				sendDocumentDownloadedAnalyticsEvent(
					event.target
				);
			}
			else if (
				event.target.parentNode &&
				event.target.parentNode.nodeName.toLowerCase() === 'a'
			) {
				sendDocumentDownloadedAnalyticsEvent(
					event.target.parentNode
				);
			}
			else {
				var target = event.target;
				var matchTextContent =
					target.textContent &&
					target.textContent.toLowerCase() ===
						'download';
				var matchTitle =
					target.title && target.title.toLowerCase() === 'download';
				var matchAction = target.action === 'download';
				var matchLexiconIcon = !!target.querySelector(
					'.lexicon-icon-download'
				);
				var matchLexiconClassName = target.classList.contains(
					'lexicon-icon-download'
				);
				var matchParentTitle =
					target.parentNode &&
					target.parentNode.title &&
					target.parentNode.title.toLowerCase() === 'download';
				var matchParentLexiconClassName =
					target.parentNode &&
					target.parentNode.classList.contains('lexicon-icon-download');

				if (
					matchTextContent ||
					matchTitle ||
					matchParentTitle ||
					matchAction ||
					matchLexiconIcon ||
					matchLexiconClassName ||
					matchParentLexiconClassName
				) {
					var selectedFiles = document.querySelectorAll(
						'.form .custom-control-input:checked'
					);

					selectedFiles.forEach(({value}) => {
						var selectedFile = document.querySelector(
							'[data-analytics-file-entry-id="' + value + '"]'
						);

						sendDocumentDownloadedAnalyticsEvent(
							selectedFile
						);
					});
				}
			}
		}
	}

	Liferay.once('destroyPortlet', () => {
		document.body.removeEventListener(
			'click',
			handleDownloadClick
		);
	});

	Liferay.once('portletReady', () => {
		document.body.addEventListener(
			'click',
			handleDownloadClick
		);
	});

(function() {var $ = AUI.$;var _ = AUI._;
	var onDestroyPortlet = function () {
		Liferay.detach('messagePosted', onMessagePosted);
		Liferay.detach('destroyPortlet', onDestroyPortlet);
	};

	Liferay.on('destroyPortlet', onDestroyPortlet);

	var onMessagePosted = function (event) {
		if (window.Analytics) {
			const eventProperties = {
				className: event.className,
				classPK: event.classPK,
				commentId: event.commentId,
				text: event.text,
			};

			const blogNode = document.querySelector(
				'[data-analytics-asset-id="' + event.classPK + '"]'
			);

			const dmNode = document.querySelector(
				'[data-analytics-file-entry-id="' + event.classPK + '"]'
			);

			if (blogNode) {
				eventProperties.title = blogNode.dataset.analyticsAssetTitle;
			}
			else if (dmNode) {
				eventProperties.title = dmNode.dataset.analyticsFileEntryTitle;
			}

			Analytics.send('posted', 'Comment', eventProperties);
		}
	};

	Liferay.on('messagePosted', onMessagePosted);
})();
(function() {var $ = AUI.$;var _ = AUI._;
	var onShare = function (data) {
		if (window.Analytics) {
			Analytics.send('shared', 'SocialBookmarks', {
				className: data.className,
				classPK: data.classPK,
				type: data.type,
				url: data.url,
			});
		}
	};

	var onDestroyPortlet = function () {
		Liferay.detach('socialBookmarks:share', onShare);
		Liferay.detach('destroyPortlet', onDestroyPortlet);
	};

	Liferay.on('socialBookmarks:share', onShare);
	Liferay.on('destroyPortlet', onDestroyPortlet);
})();

if('false' && ("" === "true")) {

  var popUpWindow;
  var userId = '20161';
  var surveyDbId = "";
  var userLastLoginTime = '1472737411000';
  var urlWithExternalIdAndCDB = "";
  var actionTakenByUser = "no";
  var selectedExternalId = "";
  var userLanguage = "";

  function openSurveyFirstPopup(popUpTitle) {
  	  
	  AUI().use('aui-base',
				'aui-io-plugin-deprecated',
				'liferay-util-window',
	     function(A) {
			var surveyFirstPopupContent = $('#surveyFirstPopupContent').html();
		    saveDataThroughAjax('displayed');
		    popUpWindow=Liferay.Util.Window.getWindow(
				{
					dialog: {
						cssClass: 'surveyFirstPopupCss',
						destroyOnClose: true,
						destroyOnHide: true,
						modal: false,
						resizable: false,
						height: 350,
						width: 500,
						bodyContent: '<div id="surveyFirstPopupDiv"></div>'
					},
					title: popUpTitle
				}
				).plug(
				A.Plugin.IO,
				{
					autoLoad: false
				}).render();
				popUpWindow.show();
				A.one('#surveyFirstPopupDiv').html(surveyFirstPopupContent);
	});
}
function saveDataThroughAjax(action) {
	  	var urlString = 'https://www.lufthansa-cargo.com' + '/c/portal/survey_popup';
	  	urlString = urlString + '?actionPerformed=' + action;
		urlString = urlString + '&userId=' + userId;
		urlString = urlString + '&surveyDbId=' + surveyDbId;
		urlString = urlString + '&userLastLoginTime=' + userLastLoginTime;
		urlString = urlString + '&selectedExternalId=' + selectedExternalId;
		urlString = urlString + '&userLanguage=' + userLanguage;
		
		AUI().io.request(urlString, {
			method: 'POST',
			dataType: 'json',
			cache: false,
			on: {
				success: function() {
				}
			}
	  	});
}
function actionPerformed(action) {
	
		actionTakenByUser = action;
		
			var urlString = 'https://www.lufthansa-cargo.com' + '/c/portal/survey_popup';
		  	urlString = urlString + '?actionPerformed=' + action;
			urlString = urlString + '&userId=' + userId;
			urlString = urlString + '&surveyDbId=' + surveyDbId;
			urlString = urlString + '&userLastLoginTime=' + userLastLoginTime;
			urlString = urlString + '&selectedExternalId=' + selectedExternalId;
			urlString = urlString + '&userLanguage=' + userLanguage;
			
			popUpWindow.destroy();
			openSurveyPopup(urlString);
			$('#popUpDialog .close.close-content').on('click', function () {
				console.log('close clicked!!');
				$('#popUpDialog.dialog-iframe-modal').removeClass('show');
			});
}
function openSurveyPopup(urlString) {
	
  AUI().use( 'aui-io',
     'aui-dialog',
     function(A) {

	     Liferay.Util.openWindow(
	              {
	                   dialog: {
	                       destroyOnClose: true,
	                       destroyOnHide: true,
	                       cache: false,
	                       modal: true,
			               height: 800,
			               width: 1296,
			               close: true
	                  },
	                  title: surveyTitle,
	                  id:'popUpDialog',
	                  uri: urlString
       			});
	        Liferay.provide(
	               window,
	               'close',
	               function(popupIdToClose) {
	                var popupDialog = Liferay.Util.Window.getById(popupIdToClose);
	                popupDialog.destroy();
	               }, 
	               ['aui-base','aui-dialog','aui-dialog-iframe','liferay-util-window']
	         );
   });  
}

}

							A.DialogManager.hideAll();
						});
				}
				
			});
		
(function() {var $ = AUI.$;var _ = AUI._;
	function showDialog(uri, title) {
		Liferay.Util.openModal({
			id: 'sharingDialog',
			iframeBodyCssClass: 'sharing-dialog',
			height: '475px',
			size: 'md',
			title: title,
			url: uri,
		});
	}

	var Sharing = {
		copyLink: function (link) {
			navigator.clipboard.writeText(link);

			Liferay.Util.openToast({
				message:
					'Copied link to the clipboard.',
			});
		},

		manageCollaborators: function (classNameId, classPK) {
			var manageCollaboratorsParameters = {
				classNameId: classNameId,
				classPK: classPK,
			};

			var manageCollaboratorsURL = Liferay.Util.PortletURL.createPortletURL(
				'https://www.lufthansa-cargo.com/en/group/guest/~/control_panel/manage?p_p_id=com_liferay_sharing_web_portlet_ManageCollaboratorsPortlet&p_p_lifecycle=0&p_p_state=pop_up&p_p_auth=0To7CESN',
				manageCollaboratorsParameters
			);

			showDialog(
				manageCollaboratorsURL.toString(),
				'Manage Collaborators'
			);
		},

		share: function (classNameId, classPK, title) {
			var sharingParameters = {
				classNameId: classNameId,
				classPK: classPK,
			};

			var sharingURL = Liferay.Util.PortletURL.createPortletURL(
				'https://www.lufthansa-cargo.com/en/group/guest/~/control_panel/manage?p_p_id=com_liferay_sharing_web_portlet_SharingPortlet&p_p_lifecycle=0&p_p_state=pop_up&p_p_auth=rBfItGhU',
				sharingParameters
			);

			showDialog(sharingURL.toString(), title);
		},
	};

	Liferay.Sharing = Sharing;
})();

var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
    mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
        if (mutation.addedNodes && mutation.addedNodes.length > 0) {
            var hasClass = [].some.call(mutation.addedNodes, function(el) {
            if(el.classList){
                return el.classList.contains('modal-focused')
            }
            });
            if (hasClass) {
                $('.modal').removeClass('yui3-widget');
            }
        }
    });
});

var observerConfig = {
    attributes: true,
    childList: true,
    characterData: true
};
 
observer.observe(document.body, observerConfig);

	$ = jQuery.noConflict();
	Portal = window.Portal || {};
	var restrictedExtentions = 'ACTION,APK,BAT,BIN,CMD,COM,COMMAND,EXE,CPL,CSH,GADGET,INF1,INS,INX,IPA,ISU,JOB,JSE,KSH,LNK,MSC,MSI,MSP,MST,OSX,OUT,PAF,PHP,PIF,PRG,PS1,REG,RGS,RUN,SCR,SCT,SHB,SHS,U3P,VB,VBE,VBS,VBSCRIPT,WORKFLOW,WS,WSF,WSH';

	var filterExtensions = restrictedExtentions.split(",");



	Portal.filterExtensions=filterExtensions;
	Object.preventExtensions( Portal );
	Object.freeze( Portal );
	
if (typeof CKEDITOR !== 'undefined') {
  CKEDITOR.on('dialogDefinition', function (ev) {
    if (ev.data.name === 'link') {
      var dialogDefinition = ev.data.definition;
      var infoTab = dialogDefinition.getContents('info');

      if (infoTab) {
        var linkTypeField = infoTab.get('linkType');

        if (linkTypeField) {
          linkTypeField.items.push(
            ['Download Link', 'downloadlink'],
            ['Phone Link', 'phonelink'],
            ['External Link', 'externallink'],
            ['Email Link', 'emaillink'],
			['Navigation Link', 'navigationLink']
          );
        }
      }

      // Hook into the dialog's onOk event
      dialogDefinition.onOk = function () {
        let dialog = this;
        let editor = dialog.getParentEditor();

        let linkType = dialog.getValueOf('info', 'linkType');
        let url = dialog.getValueOf('info', 'url');
        let linkElement = dialog.getSelectedElement();

        // If editing an existing link, reuse it — else create a new one
        if (!linkElement) {
          linkElement = CKEDITOR.dom.element.createFromHtml(
            '<a href="' + url + '">' + url + '</a>',
            editor.document
          );
        } else {
          linkElement.setAttribute('href', url);
        }

        // Remove any previously assigned class attribute
        linkElement.removeAttribute('class');

        // Add classes based on link type
        switch (linkType) {
          case 'downloadlink':
          linkElement.$.classList.add('lcagLink', 'downloadIcon', 'functional');
          	break;
          case 'phonelink':
          linkElement.$.classList.add('lcagLink', 'phoneIcon', 'functional');
          	break;
          case 'externallink':
            linkElement.$.classList.add('lcagLink', 'externalIcon', 'navigational');
            break;
          case 'emaillink':
            linkElement.$.classList.add('lcagLink', 'mailIcon', 'navigational');
            break;
		  case 'navigationLink':
            linkElement.$.classList.add('lcagLink', 'hyperlinkIcon', 'navigational');
            break;
        }
      };
    }
  });
}	

var optionalConfigLabel= "";
	var optnField= 'true';
	if(optnField == "true"){
		 optionalConfigLabel= 'optional';
	}else{
		 optionalConfigLabel= "";
	}
